name: rtp-personal-skills
description: Ravi Teja Palanki's second brain — installable as a Claude Code plugin. A top-0.1% AI PM by depth, a smart human across every domain by breadth. 80 skills total: rtp-aipm-orchestrator v1.4.0 (always on, every session, scope determined by the question) + 62 AI PM skills across 7 specialist layers (thinking-core, product-sense, ai-strategy, safety-and-trust, agent-design, eval-and-quality, craft) + 17 general-purpose skills (thinking, writing, branding, presentations, visualization, design-systems, research, admin, resume, readme-storytelling). 11 slash commands including /rtp-setup for ecosystem bootstrap. Install once, absorb the full skill library on any machine. Companion plugin manifest at COMPANION-PLUGINS.md documents the 5-tier wider ecosystem (superpowers, compound-engineering, pm-skills, anthropic-skills, dev tools) the orchestrator commands.
